title: Supporting data for "Identifying viable Neisseria gonorrhoeae through validation and application of viability RT-PCR"
author: Vellema, Sem
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Supporting data for: Identifying viable Neisseria gonorrhoeae through
validation and application of viability RT-PCR

Raw porA qPCR Ct values underlying the findings of the manuscript.

FILES

technical_validation_data.csv  Ct values from dilution-series experiments
                               (5 strains x 3 cultures x 6 ratios x 2 PMAxx
                               conditions = 180 rows).

clinical_samples_data.csv      Ct values and culture results from 87 clinical
                               specimens.
